title: Pelle & Sol 2.2m Telescopic Washing Line Pole – Heavy Duty Washing Line Prop for Outside - Clothes Prop for Outdoor Drying – Extendable Pole & Clothes Line Support – Pack of 2
features: Adjustable Telescopic Design: 2.2m telescopic pole, easily adjustable to provide the perfect height and support for your clothesline, ensuring maximum convenience and flexibility for drying laundry outdoors.

Durable Iron with PP Coating: Made from tough iron material with a weather-resistant PP coating, this pole is built to withstand harsh outdoor elements, providing long-lasting durability for years of reliable use.

Enhanced Stability with Dual Diameters: Designed with dual pole diameters of 16mm and 19mm, this prop pole offers enhanced strength and stability, keeping your clothesline secure even with heavier laundry loads.

Lightweight and Easy to Handle: Weighing approximately 415g, this washing line prop pole is lightweight yet sturdy, making it easy to carry, transport, and set up in your garden or outdoor area without hassle.
